channel.title: Jithendra Kumar — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts about cloud architecture, DevOps, and MLOps.

item.title: Introducing the blog
item.description: A quick test post to demonstrate blog structure in the portfolio site.

item.title: Modern CI/CD patterns for reliable delivery
item.description: Practical CI/CD patterns: ephemeral runners, pipeline-as-code, and gated releases.

item.title: Reflections on platform engineering as a career
item.description: Non-technical reflections on platform engineering, product thinking, and career choices.

item.title: CI/CD modernization: real-world case study
item.description: Case study: migrating to pipeline-as-code, ephemeral runners, and gated releases.

item.title: Building reusable cloud foundations with Terraform
item.description: How to design versioned Terraform modules for secure, repeatable cloud foundations.

item.title: Enabling MLOps: pipelines, validation, and model lifecycle
item.description: Practical MLOps patterns: reproducible training, validation gates, and model registries.

item.title: AI guardrails and cost controls for production systems
item.description: Strategies for rate limiting, caching, fallback routing, and observability for AI systems.

item.title: Career paths: platform engineering and product thinking
item.description: Advice on treating platforms as products and measuring developer experience outcomes.
